rationale: In the citing paper, Chevalier and Mayzlin (2006) appears only in an introductory grouped citation supporting the general claim that online WOM attributes affect consumer decision making. The citing authors do not engage this specific paper's findings, identification strategy, or mechanisms when building their hypotheses about graphical rating displays. It is not used for measurement, method transfer, or result interpretation, so its role is background mention rather than a meaningful pillar of the argument.
